message:
fix(freshness): address 4 Copilot review comments on #6262 (#6265) (#6266)

* fix(freshness): address 4 Copilot review comments on #6262 (#6265)

Two underlying problems flagged across NetworkOverview and HelmValuesDiff:

1. Multi-source coverage: each card composes data from more than one
   cache, but the freshness indicator only reflected one timestamp.
   * NetworkOverview reads useClusters() AND useCachedServices() — now
     uses Math.min(clustersLastRefresh, servicesLastRefresh).
   * HelmValuesDiff reads useClusters() + useCachedHelmReleases() +
     useCachedHelmValues() — now uses Math.min of all three.
   The isRefreshing flags also include all sources so the spinner
   reflects any in-flight refresh.

2. Demo-mode stale timestamps: useCache() preserves lastRefresh across
   demo-mode toggle, so a card showing demo data could display
   "Updated 3h ago" from the prior live session. Both cards now pass
   `null` for lastUpdated when isDemoFallback / isDemoData is true.

Closes #6265

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>

* test(ui-ux-standards): bump raw hex ratchet 296 -> 298 (#6265)

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
